ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the size chart (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Pants, Shirts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart it belongs to */,
  "point_of_measurement" TEXT /* Point of measurement (e.g., Outseam, Inseam) */,
  "size_xs" REAL /* Measurement for size XS */,
  "size_s" REAL /* Measurement for size S */,
  "size_m" REAL /* Measurement for size M */,
  "size_l" REAL /* Measurement for size L */,
  "size_xl" REAL /* Measurement for size XL */,
  "size_2xl" REAL /* Measurement for size 2XL */,
  "size_3xl" REAL /* Measurement for size 3XL */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, QA, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., design, production, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart it belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created or updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the return */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart related to the return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., size mismatch) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "return_description" TEXT /* Description of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Feedback text provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size label */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (XS, S, M, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the size label represents */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order of the size label (e.g., XS=1, S=2, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_sizes" (
  "size_chart_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart size entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)
